follow_up_tasks.payload: {"action": "verify_whale_scorer_optimization_in_production", "detail": "After next deployment, verify that the global_median_30d optimization is working by checking monitor logs for the pre-compute query timing", "priority": "medium"}

{"action": "review_MIN_WHALE_SCORE_threshold", "detail": "The MIN_WHALE_SCORE threshold in signal_generator.py is set to 0.20. Review whether this is still appropriate given the new cold-start blend formula in whale_scorer.", "priority": "medium"}

{"action": "add_monitor_cycle_timing_metrics", "detail": "Add per-phase timing instrumentation to _poll_all_wallets_inner() so each phase reports its duration. Use monotonic clock, log at INFO level only if phase exceeds threshold.", "priority": "low"}
